name: X-TREME - The Battle Bricks
description:
“IF_ROLL=(12-20), THEN=KILL_BACKLINERS”

You’re an evil.. thing, X-TREME. I haven’t even beaten you on 3 stars yet.

X-TREME, from the Battle Bricks. Also also from the Tumore version of Area 51, also also also known for being a backline deleter.

POV is that you’re a battler that got sent out. Er, one of the ones with plot armor, maybe. Or you just get folded, your call!

Despite being a robot, it moves undeniably organically.. interesting!

The Battle Bricks.

Gimme feedback!
creator: Xiax
